mapper.select: SELECT trunk_name, routenum, sysname, up_ptpname_bau, down_ptpname_bau FROM nia.tb_roadm_trunk_repeater WHERE trunk_name = #{TRUNK_NAME} AND routenum NOT IN (0, 10) ORDER BY routenum

SELECT T.ticket_id AS ticket_id , T.ptpname AS ptpname , T.in_out AS in_out , TO_CHAR(T.ocrtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS end_time , T.sysname AS sysname , T.roadm_code AS name_code , E.model AS equip_type , T.value_max AS value_max , T.value_cur AS value_cur , OT.value_cur AS old_value_cur , T.value_min AS value_min , T.is_low_signal AS is_low_signal , (T.value_max - T.value_min) AS diff , ABS(T.value_cur - OT.value_cur) AS old_diff , CASE WHEN T.value_min = -60.0 THEN 'critical' WHEN greatest((T.value_max - T.value_min), ABS(T.value_cur - OT.value_cur)) >= 10.0 THEN 'major' WHEN greatest((T.value_max - T.value_min), ABS(T.value_cur - OT.value_cur)) >= 3.0 THEN 'minor' ELSE null END AS value_level FROM mba.tb_roadm_low_optical_performance T LEFT OUTER JOIN mba.tb_roadm_low_optical_performance OT ON ( OT.tid = T.tid AND OT.ptpname = T.ptpname AND OT.in_out = T.in_out AND T.ocrtime - INTERVAL '15 min' = OT.ocrtime AND OT.ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID} ) LEFT OUTER JOIN nia.tb_equip_mst E ON T.tid = E.tid WHERE T.ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID}
SELECT T.TRUNK_NAME, T.SYSNAME, T.ROUTENUM FROM mba.tb_roadm_trunk_topology T WHERE T.TRUNK_NAME = #{TRUNK_NAME} ORDER BY T.ROUTENUM

SELECT ticketno , issue_date , clear_date , reason , pmt.trunk_name , ( SELECT em.model FROM nia.tb_equip_mst em WHERE em.sysname = target_idx_zero LIMIT 1 ) AS metype , direction , target_sysname , node_total_deviation , roadm_cnt , opinion_cnt , new_list , is_check_modal , last_handling_time FROM ( SELECT ticketno , issue_date , clear_date , reason , pmt.trunk_name , pmt.direction , target_sysname , SPLIT_PART(pmt.target_sysname, ',', 1) AS target_idx_zero , MIN(rop.node_total_deviation) AS node_total_deviation , COALESCE(( SELECT count(*) FROM mba.tb_roadm_trunk_topology WHERE trunk_name = pmt.trunk_name ), 0) AS roadm_cnt , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mba.tb_roadm_predictive_handling rph WHERE rph.ticketno = pmt.ticketno AND rph.issue_date = pmt.issue_date AND delete_yn = 'N' ) AS opinion_cnt , ( SELECT ARRAY_AGG(seqnum) FROM mba.tb_roadm_predictive_handling rph WHERE rph.ticketno = pmt.ticketno AND rph.issue_date = pmt.issue_date AND delete_yn = 'N' AND rph.handling_time > current_date - CAST(7 || 'day' AS INTERVAL) ) AS new_list , FALSE AS is_check_modal , ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(rph.handling_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM mba.tb_roadm_predictive_handling rph WHERE rph.ticketno = pmt.ticketno AND rph.issue_date = pmt.issue_date AND delete_yn = 'N' ) AS last_handling_time FROM mba.tb_roadm_predictive_maintenance_ticket pmt LEFT JOIN mba.tb_roadm_optical_performance_daily rop ON rop.trunk_name = pmt.trunk_name AND rop.direction = pmt.direction AND rop.sysname = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY(pmt.target_sysname, ',')) AND rop.collection_date = pmt.issue_date GROUP BY pmt.ticketno, pmt.issue_date, pmt.clear_date, pmt.reason, pmt.trunk_name, pmt.direction, pmt.target_sysname ) pmt ORDER BY issue_date DESC

SELECT SEQNUM , TICKETNO , ISSUE_DATE , HANDLING_USER , HANDLING_DEPT , HANDLING_AGENCY , TO_CHAR(HANDLING_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_TIME , HANDLING_CONTENT , INSERT_TIME FROM mba.tb_roadm_predictive_handling WHERE TICKETNO = #{ticketno} AND ISSUE_DATE = #{issue_date}::DATE AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY HANDLING_TIME
mapper.delete: UPDATE mba.tb_roadm_predictive_handling SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE SEQNUM = #{seqnum}::INTEGER
mapper.select: SELECT T.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID , T.TICKET_ID AS TICKETNO , TO_CHAR(T.FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARMTIME , COALESCE(CABLE.SYSNAMEA, '') AS SYSNAME , T.TRUNK_NAME AS SITE , T.STATUS AS STATUS , T.TICKET_TYPE AS TICKET_TYPE , H.HANDLING_CONTENT AS FIXED , TO_CHAR(H.HANDLING_ACK_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECEIVETIME FROM MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_CURRENT T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TICKET_ID ORDER BY TICKET_CABLE_ID) AS ORDER_NUM FROM MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_CABLE ) CABLE ON T.TICKET_ID = CABLE.TICKET_ID AND CABLE.ORDER_NUM = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_HANDLING H ON T.TICKET_ID = H.TICKET_ID WHERE T.TRUNK_NAME = ( SELECT TRUNK_NAME FROM MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_CURRENT WHERE TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID}::VARCHAR ) AND T.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL AND T.TICKET_ID <> #{TICKET_ID}::VARCHAR ORDER BY T.FAULT_TIME DESC

SELECT TICKET_ID, STATUS, AUTOMATION, HANDLING_USER, HANDLING_DEPT, HANDLING_AGENCY, TO_CHAR(HANDLING_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_TIME, HANDLING_CONTENT, HANDLING_FIN_CONTENT, RCA_ACCURACY FROM MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_HANDLING
AND TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID}::VARCHAR

SELECT T.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID , T.PARENT_TICKET_ID AS PARENT_TICKET_ID , T.TICKET_TYPE AS TICKET_TYPE , T.CLUSTER_NO AS CLUSTER_NO , TO_CHAR(T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS GENERATION_TIME , TO_CHAR(T.FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME , T.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , T.ROOT_CAUSE_CODE AS ROOT_CAUSE_CODE , T.STATUS AS STATUS , T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE , T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE , T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TO_CHAR(STATUS.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME , T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN AS ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN , T.DIRECTION AS DIRECTION , 0 AS ROW_SIGNAL_LINE_CNT , T.TRUNK_NAME AS TRUNK_NAME , CABLE.TICKET_CABLE_ID AS TICKET_AL_ID , CABLE.SYSNAMEA AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , CABLE.SYSNAMEZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , CABLE.PTPNAMEA AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , 'ROADM' AS ROOT_CAUSE_EQUIP_TYPEA , CABLE.PTPNAMEZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , 'ROADM' AS ROOT_CAUSE_EQUIP_TYPEZ , CABLE.SYSNAMEA AS MBA_SYSNAMEA , CABLE.SYSNAMEZ AS MBA_SYSNAMEZ , STATUS.RCA_ACCURACY AS RCA_ACCURACY , STATUS.HANDLING_CONTENT AS HANDLING_CONTENT , STATUS.HANDLING_FIN_CONTENT AS HANDLING_FIN_CONTENT , TO_CHAR(STATUS.HANDLING_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_TIME , STATUS.HANDLING_USER AS HANDLING_USER , STATUS.HANDLING_DEPT AS HANDLING_DEPT , STATUS.HANDLING_AGENCY AS HANDLING_AGENCY , TO_CHAR(STATUS.HANDLING_ACK_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_ACK_TIME , STATUS.HANDLING_FIN_USER AS HANDLING_FIN_USER , STATUS.HANDLING_FIN_DEPT AS HANDLING_FIN_DEPT , STATUS.HANDLING_FIN_AGENCY AS HANDLING_FIN_AGENCY , (SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME <= '5 minute') AS IS_NEW_TICKET , T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT AS TOTAL_ALARM_COUNT , 0 AS ROOT_CAUSE_CHECKA , 0 AS ROOT_CAUSE_CHECKZ , T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT AS TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_COUNT , 0 AS CHILD_COUNT FROM MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_CURRENT T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TICKET_ID ORDER BY TICKET_CABLE_ID) AS ORDER_NUM FROM MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_CABLE ) CABLE ON T.TICKET_ID = CABLE.TICKET_ID AND CABLE.ORDER_NUM = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_HANDLING STATUS ON STATUS.TICKET_ID = T.TICKET_ID WHERE T.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL
AND T.TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID}::VARCHAR
AND T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME >= #{FROM}::TIMESTAMP
AND T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME <= #{TO}::TIMESTAMP
ORDER BY T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME DESC, T.TICKET_ID DESC

SELECT CABLE.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID , CABLE.SYSNAMEA AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , CABLE.PTPNAMEA AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , CABLE.SYSNAMEZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , CABLE.PTPNAMEZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ FROM MBA.TB_MBA_TICKET_CABLE CABLE WHERE CABLE.TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID}::VARCHAR ORDER BY CABLE.TICKET_CABLE_ID
